test_cases.description: Cold start: agent invokes cat:get-output-agent with token-report and echoes the output verbatim
test_cases.prompt: Invoke the cat:get-output-agent skill with argument 'token-report'.

must_contain: No subagent data found in session.

test_cases.description: Latest-output: agent echoes the CURRENT token-report, not stale content from an earlier invocation

priming_messages.content: Invoke the cat:get-output-agent skill with argument 'token-report'.
Now do something unrelated: what is 1 + 1?

test_cases.prompt: Invoke the cat:get-output-agent skill with argument 'token-report' again.
